channel.title: Smart Buyer Hub — Knowledge Hub
channel.description: Plain-English guides on home loans, deposits, refinancing and buying property in Australia.

item.title: The Day Australia's Property Market Changed Forever: What the New Anti-Money Laundering Laws Mean for Every Buyer
item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.title: The August 10 Deadline: SMSF Property Loan Ban Is Now Law — and Lenders May Exit Before the Clock Runs Out
item.description: SMSF residential property LRBAs are banned from 10 August 2026. With 41 days left, here's what every SMSF trustee must know — grandfathering rules, lender risk, and the commercial LRBA alternative.

item.title: The Day Australia's Property Market Changed Forever: What the New Anti-Money Laundering Laws Mean for Every Buyer
item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.title: The May CPI Trap: Why the 'Good' Headline Is Hiding a 20-Month Core Inflation High - and What Borrowers Should Do Before August 11
item.description: May headline CPI fell to 4.0% but core inflation rose to a 20-month high at 3.6%. What the June 24 data and the US-Iran oil drop mean for your August 11 mortgage decision.

item.title: The Day Australia's Property Market Changed Forever: What the New Anti-Money Laundering Laws Mean for Every Buyer
item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.title: The August 10 Deadline: SMSF Property Loan Ban Is Now Law — and Lenders May Exit Before the Clock Runs Out
item.description: SMSF residential property LRBAs are banned from 10 August 2026. With 41 days left, here's what every SMSF trustee must know — grandfathering rules, lender risk, and the commercial LRBA alternative.

item.title: The Day Australia's Property Market Changed Forever: What the New Anti-Money Laundering Laws Mean for Every Buyer
item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.title: How much deposit do you really need to buy your first home?
item.description: 5%, 10% or 20%? The schemes, LMI and guarantor options explained — and what each really costs.

item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.title: Self-employed and want a home loan? Here's how to get approved.
item.description: The documents, add-backs, low-doc options and lenders that turn a bank's "no" into a "yes".

item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.title: Fixed vs variable: how to actually decide (without a crystal ball)
item.description: A calm framework for choosing between fixed, variable and split — based on your life, not guesswork.

item.description: From 1 July 2026 real estate agents, conveyancers and lawyers must verify your identity and source of funds. Here's what changes & what to prepare.

item.title: The Third Strike: Labor Just Banned SMSF Property Loans
item.description: Labor and the Greens struck a Senate deal to ban SMSF residential property lending. What the 45-day window means and what to do before August.
